title: The Walk-Offs
writer: Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton, June Mathis
actors: May Allison, Emory Johnson, Effie Conley
plot: After Schuyler Rutherford's divorce from his rich wife Caroline, who was his meal ticket, his sister Kathleen is so humiliated by the fact that her penniless condition was brought to light during the court proceedings that she see...
